scripts.base: node ../pm.js run container -- build -t talquen-basix Base
scripts.build: node ../pm.js run container -- build -t talquen-camoufox Camoufox
scripts.start: node ../pm.js run container -- run --replace --name talquen-camoufox -p 42200-42220:42200-42220 -dt talquen-camoufox
scripts.update: node ../pm.js run build && npm run start
scripts.deploy: node ../pm.js run base && npm run update
